languages.original_text: "My physical integrity has been restored. I had to closely inspect my flesh and augments, purging the xenos corruption from everything I could... But I fear that the only way I can expel the foulness is by performing purification rituals on the ship under the holy machinery of the Sector Bionica. I suspect that many more of my implants are tainted, but I, at least, am functional. My mind, however, is in turmoil — the flaw of irrationality veils my thoughts like a shroud. But I will cast it off — to succumb would be to concede the xenos's victory. I will not allow it!"

languages.text: "Моя физическая целостность восстановлена. Мне пришлось пристально изучить свою плоть и аугменты, очищая от ксеносской скверны все, что было мне подвластно... Но боюсь, что окончательно исторгнуть мерзость я смогу лишь проведя очистительные ритуалы на судне под сенью святой машинерии Сектора Бионика. Я подозреваю, что еще многие мои импланты осквернены, но, по крайней мере, я функционален. Однако мой разум в смятении — порок иррациональности застилает мысли, словно саван. Но я отгоню его — ведь поддаться значит признать победу ксеноса. Не быть тому!"

But I will cast it off — to succumb would be to concede the xenos's victory. I will not allow it!"

languages.text: «Mi integridad física ha quedado restaurada. He tenido que inspeccionar mi carne y mis aumentos, purgando la corrupción de los xenos en la medida de lo posible... Pero temo que la única manera de expulsar su contaminación sea someterme a los rituales de purificación de la sagrada maquinaria del Sector Bionica de la nave. Sospecho que muchos de mis implantes siguen mancillados, pero al menos estoy operativo. Mi mente, en cambio, aún sufre las consecuencias: el defecto de la irracionalidad cubre mis pensamientos como un velo. Pero lo apartaré, pues sucumbir supondría la rendición ante los xenos. ¡No lo permitiré!».
languages.original_text: "My physical integrity has been restored. I had to closely inspect my flesh and augments, purging the xenos corruption from everything I could... But I fear that the only way I can expel the foulness is by performing purification rituals on the ship under the holy machinery of the Sector Bionica. I suspect that many more of my implants are tainted, but I, at least, am functional. My mind, however, is in turmoil — the flaw of irrationality veils my thoughts like a shroud. But I will cast it off — to succumb would be to concede the xenos's victory. I will not allow it!"

Pero temo que la única manera de expulsar su contaminación sea someterme a los rituales de purificación de la sagrada maquinaria del Sector Bionica de la nave. Sospecho que muchos de mis implantes siguen mancillados, pero al menos estoy operativo. Mi mente, en cambio, aún sufre las consecuencias: el defecto de la irracionalidad cubre mis pensamientos como un velo. Pero lo apartaré, pues sucumbir supondría la rendición ante los xenos. ¡No lo permitiré!».

languages.text: “我的身体完整性已经恢复。我不得不仔细检查自己的血肉与植入物，尽我所能清除了一切异形腐化……但恐怕想彻底驱逐这份污秽，唯一的办法就是借助仿生区的神圣机械，在舰船上执行净化仪式。我怀疑还有更多植入物遭受到污染，但至少，我还能正常运转。可我的思维一片混乱，非理性的缺陷像帷幕一样遮蔽着我的思想。但我会摆脱它——若就此沉沦，便等于承认了异形的胜利。我绝不允许这种事发生！”
languages.original_text: "My physical integrity has been restored. I had to closely inspect my flesh and augments, purging the xenos corruption from everything I could... But I fear that the only way I can expel the foulness is by performing purification rituals on the ship under the holy machinery of the Sector Bionica. I suspect that many more of my implants are tainted, but I, at least, am functional. My mind, however, is in turmoil — the flaw of irrationality veils my thoughts like a shroud. But I will cast it off — to succumb would be to concede the xenos's victory. I will not allow it!"

traits.locale_text: “我的身体完整性已经恢复。我不得不仔细检查自己的血肉与植入物，尽我所能清除了一切异形腐化……但恐怕想彻底驱逐这份污秽，唯一的办法就是借助仿生区的神圣机械，在舰船上执行净化仪式。我怀疑还有更多植入物遭受到污染，但至少，我还能正常运转。可我的思维一片混乱，非理性的缺陷像帷幕一样遮蔽着我的思想。但我会摆脱它——若就此沉沦，便等于承认了异形的胜利。我绝不允许这种事发生！”

languages.text: « Mon intégrité physique a été restaurée. J'ai dû examiner ma chair et mes augmentations avec le plus grand soin pour exciser dès que possible la corruption xénos... Cependant, je crains que le seul moyen de l'éliminer entièrement soit d'accomplir des rituels de purification sur le vaisseau avec les saintes machines du secteur Bionica. Je crains que bien d'autres de mes implants ne soient corrompus, mais au moins, je demeure fonctionnel. Mon esprit, par contre, est en proie au plus grand trouble ; l'irrationalité jette un voile sombre sur mes pensées. Mais je saurai le chasser. Succomber équivaudrait à admettre la victoire des xénos. Et cela, je ne le tolérerai pas ! »
languages.original_text: "My physical integrity has been restored. I had to closely inspect my flesh and augments, purging the xenos corruption from everything I could... But I fear that the only way I can expel the foulness is by performing purification rituals on the ship under the holy machinery of the Sector Bionica. I suspect that many more of my implants are tainted, but I, at least, am functional. My mind, however, is in turmoil — the flaw of irrationality veils my thoughts like a shroud. But I will cast it off — to succumb would be to concede the xenos's victory. I will not allow it!"

traits.locale_text: « Mon intégrité physique a été restaurée. J'ai dû examiner ma chair et mes augmentations avec le plus grand soin pour exciser dès que possible la corruption xénos... Cependant, je crains que le seul moyen de l'éliminer entièrement soit d'accomplir des rituels de purification sur le vaisseau avec les saintes machines du secteur Bionica. Je crains que bien d'autres de mes implants ne soient corrompus, mais au moins, je demeure fonctionnel. Mon esprit, par contre, est en proie au plus grand trouble ; l'irrationalité jette un voile sombre sur mes pensées. Mais je saurai le chasser. Succomber équivaudrait à admettre la victoire des xénos. Et cela, je ne le tolérerai pas ! »

languages.text: "Meine physische Integrität wurde wiederhergestellt. Ich musste mein Fleisch und meine Augmentationen sorgsam inspizieren und die Xenos-Verderbnis so gut es ging ausmerzen ... Aber ich fürchte, ich kann das Übel nur vertreiben, wenn ich mich auf dem Schiff den Reinigungsriten der heiligen Maschinerie des Sektors Bionica unterziehe. Ich vermute, das viele weitere meiner Implantate befallen sind, aber wenigstens bin ich funktionstüchtig. Mein Verstand ist allerdings in Aufruhr ... der Makel der Irrationalität umhüllt meine Gedanken wie ein Nebel. Aber das wird schon wieder ... nachzugeben würde bedeuten, den Sieg des Xenos anzuerkennen. Das werde ich nicht zulassen!"
languages.original_text: "My physical integrity has been restored. I had to closely inspect my flesh and augments, purging the xenos corruption from everything I could... But I fear that the only way I can expel the foulness is by performing purification rituals on the ship under the holy machinery of the Sector Bionica. I suspect that many more of my implants are tainted, but I, at least, am functional. My mind, however, is in turmoil — the flaw of irrationality veils my thoughts like a shroud. But I will cast it off — to succumb would be to concede the xenos's victory. I will not allow it!"

Aber das wird schon wieder ... nachzugeben würde bedeuten, den Sieg des Xenos anzuerkennen. Das werde ich nicht zulassen!"

languages.text: 「肉体の完全性は回復した。自らの肉とオーグメントを子細に検分し、可能な限りすべてから異種族の汚染を浄化せねばならなかった…だが、この穢れを完全に祓う唯一の道は、セクター・ビオニカの神聖なる機構のもとで艦上にて浄化の儀式を執り行うことだろうと、私は危惧している。さらに多くのインプラントが汚染されていると疑っているが、少なくとも私は機能している。しかし、私の精神は混乱の最中にある――非合理という欠陥が、屍衣のごとく私の思考を覆い隠す。だが私はそれを脱ぎ捨ててみせる――屈服することは、異種族の勝利を認めることに他ならない。断じて許さない！」
languages.original_text: "My physical integrity has been restored. I had to closely inspect my flesh and augments, purging the xenos corruption from everything I could... But I fear that the only way I can expel the foulness is by performing purification rituals on the ship under the holy machinery of the Sector Bionica. I suspect that many more of my implants are tainted, but I, at least, am functional. My mind, however, is in turmoil — the flaw of irrationality veils my thoughts like a shroud. But I will cast it off — to succumb would be to concede the xenos's victory. I will not allow it!"

languages.text: "Fiziksel bütünlüğüm onarıldı. Etimi ve ogmentlerimi yakından incelemek, zeno yozlaşmasını yapabildiğim her şeyden temizlemek zorunda kaldım... Ancak korkarım ki bu pisliği atabilmemin tek yolu, Sektör Biyonika'nın kutsal makinelerinin altında gemide arınma ayinleri gerçekleştirmektir. Birçok implantımın daha lekelendiğinden şüpheleniyorum ama en azından işlevselim. Zihnim ise karmakarışık... Mantıksızlık kusuru, düşüncelerimi bir kefen gibi örtüyor. Fakat onu fırlatıp atacağım. Boyun eğmek, zenonun zaferini kabul etmek olur. Buna izin vermeyeceğim!"
languages.original_text: "My physical integrity has been restored. I had to closely inspect my flesh and augments, purging the xenos corruption from everything I could... But I will cast it off — to succumb would be to concede the xenos's victory. I will not allow it!"
